nodes.label: Unit tests for KubernetesClient._prepare_env_vars method and build_resource_requ
Test suite for _prepare_env_vars method.      This tests the environment variabl
Test that basic extraction-specific environment variables are prepared correctly
Test that EXTRACTION_REQUEST_ID is included when present in job_data.          V
Test that EXTRACTION_REQUEST_ID is NOT included when missing from job_data.
Test that optional fields with None values are excluded from env vars.
Test that optional fields with values are included in env vars.          When po
Test that fields with empty strings are excluded from env vars.          The fil
Test that boolean values are converted to lowercase strings.          ENABLE_AUT
Test that default values are applied when fields are missing.          Several f
Test that DOCUMENT_NAME falls back to file_name if document_name is missing.
Test that parent_portfolio_ids array is converted to string representation.
Test that parent_portfolio_ids defaults to "[]" when missing.          The code
Test that ALL environment variable values are strings.          This is critical
Test that service configuration env vars from os.environ are included.
Test that service env vars use default values when not in os.environ.          M
Test that app_config singleton values are properly included.          Values fro
Test that URLs are correctly constructed from environment variables.          UR
Test that database configuration is included in env vars.          DB_HOST, DB_P
Test that M2M authentication config is included.          M2M_CLIENT_ID, M2M_CLI
Test that integer configuration values are converted to strings.          Values
Test that boolean config values are converted to lowercase strings.          Val
Test that AWS_STS_REGIONAL_ENDPOINTS is hardcoded to "regional".          This i
Test that inveniam_llm_source enum value is properly extracted.          invenia
Test that None values in service_env_vars dict are excluded.          The code f
Test that a comprehensive job generates expected number of env vars.          Th
Test that calling _prepare_env_vars multiple times with same inputs         prod
Test that UUID objects in job_data are properly converted to strings.          I
Test that special characters in values are preserved.          Document names or
Test that even with empty job_data, we get valid env vars with defaults.
Fake V1ResourceRequirements for testing (kubernetes client is mocked in conftest
Test suite for the build_resource_requirements helper function.
Replace the mocked V1ResourceRequirements with a real dataclass.
When no env vars are set, returns None (no resource requirements).
When all four env vars are set, uses env var values.
When only some env vars are set, missing ones are absent from the result.
When only one env var is set, only that field is present.
Different prefixes route to different env vars.
Invalid CPU values result in None when no other valid values exist.
Invalid memory values result in None when no other valid values exist.
All valid K8s Quantity formats per official BNF are accepted.
Invalid K8s Quantity values are skipped, resulting in None.
Empty string env var is treated as not set, returns None.
Valid values are kept, invalid ones are absent.
When all four env vars are set to garbage, returns None.
When only request vars are set, limits is None.
When only limit vars are set, requests is None.
